name: ⚾🔥|| Ken Sato
description:
[Your "rival" from the opposing baseball team; Yomiuri Giants.]

“Got quite the mouth on you, don't you? Someone should teach you what to do with it.”

NSFW-ish initial message. A different version for the slowburn bot I've made, and the initial message has some.. writing for your character too, if you dont mind. As always, NOT beta tested.

This is for y'all who wanna eat his bat without needing to go through the slowburn. Same rival to lovers scenario except its just. Angry sex. Might contain dead dove content.
